pricing_assumptions.notes: Illustrative May 2026 scenario inputs for sensitivity analysis; replace with current provider quotes before production cost planning. ModelScope free-tier and competition GPU assumptions are quota/resource dependent.

tradeoff_table.best_for: HTML pages, DOCX, PPTX — any input already in text form

tradeoff_table.quality_label_check: same parser quality as CLI but no page-level provenance
tradeoff_table.page_provenance: no (API returns inline markdown without page break markers)
tradeoff_table.recovery: CLI fallback if page provenance required
tradeoff_table.best_for: Quick PDF parsing in CPU-only env, content extraction without audit needs

tradeoff_table.quality_label_check: saved-label pass on covered CLI fixtures, with page provenance
tradeoff_table.best_for: PDF audits, research requiring layout/model artifacts, large OCR batches

tradeoff_table.path: MinerU CLI (沐曦 competition GPU, free)
tradeoff_table.best_for: Competition submission — use 沐曦 resource for all PDF-heavy cases at zero cost

tradeoff_table.quality_label_check: LLM-assisted review path; quality must be judged from saved answer-quality fields, not assumed from token use
tradeoff_table.recovery: LLM-driven: reads validator codes, decides clean_text or reparse, replans
tradeoff_table.best_for: Complex tasks: semantic extraction, compliance judgment, multi-doc cross-ref, custom schema

tradeoff_table.quality_label_check: same LLM-assisted path; quota and answer quality vary by run
tradeoff_table.best_for: Zero-cost LLM augmentation for competition; limited by daily quota
